info.title: AI4Planning Service Platform API
info.description:
## AI4Planning API Documentation

This API provides endpoints for managing the AI4Planning Service Platform.

### Core Modules
- 🔐 Client Authentication
- 👨‍💼 Admin Management
- 🛠 Services & SubServices
- 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Role Management
- 📍 Address Lookup

### Base URL
`http://localhost:5000/api/v1`

### Authentication
Most endpoints require **JWT Bearer Token**.

get.summary: Get admin profile picture by userId

put.summary: Upload or update admin profile picture

get.summary: Get employee profile picture by userId

put.summary: Upload or update employee profile picture

post.description: Creates the initial system configuration. This endpoint can only be used if configuration does not already exist.

parameters.name: defaultPassword
parameters.description: Default password. Must contain minimum 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character.

400.description: Configuration already exists or password policy failed

get.description: Fetches the current system configuration including logo URL.

put.description: Updates system configuration such as default password or logo.

parameters.name: defaultPassword
parameters.description: New default password. Must contain minimum 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character.

get.description: Fetch the profile details associated with a specific user ID.

put.description: Update profile information such as name, bio, phone numbers, council, and address.
Upload a profile picture for the specified user.

tags.name: Admin Configuration
tags.description: Endpoints for managing system-level configuration and application settings.

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: APIs for creating, updating, and managing user roles and permissions within the system.

tags.name: Client Auth
tags.description: Authentication endpoints for clients including login, registration, token management, and password operations.

tags.name: Client Users
tags.description: APIs to manage client user accounts including creation, updates, listing, and deletion.

tags.name: Client Profile
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving and updating client profile information.

tags.name: Admin Auth
tags.description: Authentication APIs for administrators including login, token refresh, and password management.

tags.name: Admin Users
tags.description: Endpoints for managing administrator accounts including creation, updates, role assignments, and removal.

tags.name: Admin Profile
tags.description: APIs to retrieve and update administrator profile details.

tags.name: Employee Auth
tags.description: Authentication endpoints for employees including login, token handling, and password management.

tags.name: Employee Users
tags.description: APIs for managing employee accounts including onboarding, updates, listing, and deletion.

tags.name: Employee Profile
tags.description: Endpoints for accessing and updating employee profile information.

tags.name: Address Lookup
tags.description: APIs for retrieving location and address-related data such as states, cities, or postal codes.

tags.name: Services
tags.description: Endpoints for managing available services including creation, updates, listing, and deletion.

tags.name: SubServices
tags.description: APIs for managing sub-services associated with primary services.

tags.name: Service Analytics
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving analytics, metrics, and reports related to services usage and performance.
